## Summary
Describe the improvement clearly.

## Area
- lexer
- parser
- resolver
- sema
- ir
- codegen
- cli
- runtime
- docs
- tests
- bench
- ci

## Why
Why would this be useful?

## Proposal
Describe the change you want to see.

## Scope
- behavior change
- tests only
- docs only
- refactor
- tooling / workflow

## Additional Context
Examples, references, or related issues.
